---
name: Experiment Proposal
about: Propose a new bottleneck experiment or backend test
title: '[Experiment] '
labels: enhancement, research
assignees: ''

---

**Hardware Target**
What hardware will this test run on?

**Model**
What model will be tested?

**Backend & Precision**
Which backend(s) and precision(s) will be compared?

**Expected Bottleneck**
What is the expected outcome or bottleneck you want to prove?

**Measurement Plan**
How will you measure performance? (e.g., using `benchmark.py`)
